name: Chilled Raspberry Bavarian Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Soften gelatin in cold water for 5 minutes.
2. Scald the milk and add the softened gelatin. Stir until dissolved.
3. Mix the egg yolks with sugar and gradually add the hot milk. Cook over boiling water for 3 minutes until the mixture coats a spoon.
4. Remove from heat and let cool. When it begins to thicken, stir in lemon juice and raspberries.
5. Gently fold in the stiffly beaten egg whites and whipped cream.
6. Pour into a spring-form pan and chill until firm.
7. Unmold and serve in slices like cake.
